title: AWS Lambda handlers should return only JSON serializable values
description: This rule checks that AWS Lambda handlers return only JSON serializable values. Returning non-serializable values can lead to unexpected behavior and errors.
message: The handler should return JSON serializable values.
recommendation: Return only JSON serializable values from the handler

noncompliant.description: Returns a list which is not JSON serializable

why_is_this_an_issue: Returning non-serializable values can lead to unexpected behavior and errors.
how_to_fix: Return only JSON serializable values from the handler.
